Article: Confirmed Darkness Issue Fixed for Blu Ray Release
[]: Confirmed: Darkness Issue Fixed for Blu-Ray Release Post by NAveryW » Wed Apr 01, 2009 3:33 pm Everybody's been complaining constantly about the darkness issues in the DVD release of Evаngelion 1.0(1). More precisely, everyone feels that the nighttime scenes are too bright. After all, it's nighttime ! Real cameras aren't able to pick up nearly that much detail at night! Fortunately, Khara appears to have heard the fаns' cries and has darkened the night scenes for its Blu-Ray release of 1.11. Screenshot comparisons: DVD Blu-Ray
